title: Scopper Gaban Tests Luffy
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Ripley, Unknown person #11, Gunko, Unknown person #12, Shamrock as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.
scene: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Just tell me where we're leaving from...

dialogue.speaker: Gunko
dialogue.text: The abyss will be where now?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nah... it's fine, but we'll have some time before, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't I at least have an hour? Also what is the current situation?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm talking about the provisions, what else? It won't do for us gods to starve, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You know, to get dressed and stuff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's with this thing?! Is it the telepathic signal???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This is bad! This is bad!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna be late!! I won't make it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was half asleep! Where are we going again?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hm? Gunko!!! what're you doing in my manor?!

summary: This part advances the Scopper Gaban and Elbaf’s New Threat through 24 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
